description: Blocks direct pushes and destructive git operations on protected branches (main, master, prod, release/*).

hooks.command: BRANCH=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo none); CMD=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '(.command // "")'); if echo "$BRANCH" | grep -qE '^(main|master|prod|release/)' && echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'git\s+push'; then exit 1; fi
hooks.statusMessage: Checking for direct push to protected branch

hooks.command: BRANCH=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo none); CMD=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '(.command // "")'); if echo "$BRANCH" | grep -qE '^(main|master|prod|release/)' && echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'git\s+(rebase|reset --hard|clean -f)'; then exit 1; fi
hooks.statusMessage: Checking for destructive git op on protected branch
